name: should use default from table when sorting by fantasy points from plays that is not in selected columns
description: Regression test: sorting by player_fantasy_points_from_plays without selecting it as a column should fall back to the default player FROM table instead of referencing an undefined CTE. Previously, the FROM table optimization would generate a CTE table alias but the CTE WITH clause was never added because the column was not in the selected columns.
expected_query: with "t17a8da902eca522432929bffa2917121" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2025_PRE_WEEK_1', '2025_PRE_WEEK_2', '2025_PRE_WEEK_3', '2025_PRE_WEEK_4', '2025_REG_WEEK_1', '2025_REG_WEEK_2', '2025_REG_WEEK_3', '2025_REG_WEEK_4', '2025_REG_WEEK_5', '2025_REG_WEEK_6', '2025_REG_WEEK_7', '2025_REG_WEEK_8', '2025_REG_WEEK_9', '2025_REG_WEEK_10', '2025_REG_WEEK_11', '2025_REG_WEEK_12', '2025_REG_WEEK_13', '2025_REG_WEEK_14', '2025_REG_WEEK_15', '2025_REG_WEEK_16', '2025_REG_WEEK_17', '2025_REG_WEEK_18', '2025_REG_WEEK_19', '2025_REG_WEEK_20', '2025_REG_WEEK_21', '2025_POST_WEEK_1', '2025_POST_WEEK_2', '2025_POST_WEEK_3', '2025_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b.pass_atts_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t17a8da902eca522432929bffa2917121.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "pass_atts_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 left join "t17a8da902eca522432929bffa2917121" on "t17a8da902eca522432929bffa2917121"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b" on "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b"."pass_atts_from_plays", t17a8da902eca522432929bffa2917121.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
